---
id: perform-o-auth-2-device-verification-flow
title: "OAuth 2.0 Device Verification Endpoint"
description: "This is the device user verification endpoint. The user is redirected here when trying to log in using the device flow."
sidebar_label: "OAuth 2.0 Device Verification Endpoint"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/openapi/ory-apis
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"OAuth 2.0 Device Verification Endpoint"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/oauth2/device/verify"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This is the device user verification endpoint. The user is redirected here when trying to log in using the device flow.

</ParamsDetails>
